commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh These are the horns which have scattered Judah, so that no man did lift up his head: but these have come to terrify them, to cast out the horns of the nations, who lifted up their horn over the land of Judah to scatter it. Hebrew, "at pleasure; none shall lift "These kingdoms shall no longer prove formidable. (Calmet) Fray, or "terrify. "Septuagint, "to sharpen them in their hands. The horns are nations "(Haydock).
